name: Zagreb (Croatia)

colors.symbolism: the field — heraldic colour of Zagreb's arms
the city walls and gate of the coat of arms
details of the coat of arms
details of the coat of arms

description: A blue field bearing the coat of arms of Zagreb in the centre — a white walled city with three towers and an open gate, on a blue shield.
history: The flag of Zagreb is blue with the city's coat of arms in the centre. The arms, depicting an open gate beneath the walls of the medieval town with three towers, have been in use since the 16th century.
